summary: Tested User Context Textarea feature on Upload page. All frontend UI tests passed (100%). Backend upload endpoint correctly accepts optional 'user_context' Form field. Backward compatibility verified - uploads without user_context still work.
passed_tests: Frontend: Upload page shows 'Tell Jasper about your situation (optional)' textarea with data-testid='user-context-section'
Frontend: Textarea has placeholder text about renting apartment
Frontend: Textarea shows character counter (0/500) with data-testid='char-counter'
Frontend: Character counter updates as user types (tested with 46 chars -> shows '46/500')
Frontend: Textarea enforces 500 character max limit (tested with 550 chars -> limited to 500)
Frontend: Textarea label says 'Your context helps Jasper analyze more accurately.'
Backend: POST /api/documents/upload accepts 'user_context' as optional Form field alongside file upload
Backend: Upload with user_context returns analysis successfully (tested with pro user)
Backend: Upload without user_context still works (backward compatible)
Backend: Upload endpoint requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
Backend: Upload endpoint requires file (returns 422 without file)
Backend: Free plan limit enforced (returns 403 after 1 document)
Regression: Upload page still shows file upload zone with data-testid='upload-zone'
Regression: Document Scanner section present with data-testid='document-scanner-section'
Regression: Case selector present with data-testid='case-select'

test_credentials.free_user: test@jasper.com / password123 (has 1 document, will get 403 on upload)

seed_data_creation: Created pro user test_context_check@jasper.com for testing unlimited uploads
context_for_next_testing_agent: User Context Textarea feature is fully implemented and working. Frontend: Upload.js has textarea with data-testid='user-context-section', input with data-testid='user-context-input', and counter with data-testid='char-counter'. Backend: server.py lines 1255-1260 accept 'user_context' as optional Form field, and lines 571-580 inject it into Claude analysis. The user_context is capped at 500 chars both client-side (maxLength) and server-side (line 1315). Test file /app/backend/tests/test_user_context_upload.py can be reused for regression testing.

user_context_textarea.title: 'Tell Jasper about your situation (optional)' - PRESENT
user_context_textarea.label: 'Your context helps Jasper analyze more accurately.' - PRESENT

backend_upload.context_injection: Injected into Claude analysis prompt - WORKING
